title: adenosma subrepens
intro: Adenosma subrepens, also known as creeping Adenosma, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenosma subrepens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Adenosma subrepens is traditionally prepared as a tea or a tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
